metadata.description: Waxpeer API for buying and selling CS2 (CSGO), Rust, TF2 skins via P2P marketplace.

sections.title: Overview (v2)
sections.description: Waxpeer API v2 (2026). WebSocket is recommended for real-time price tracking.

content.websocket: wss://api.waxpeer.com/v2 - Recommended for live price tracking.
content.rate_limits: Standard: 60 req/min. Use 'skip' parameter to avoid cached data.
content.p2p_token: Remains mandatory for trade automation; refresh via /set-p2p-fetch-token (valid 1 hour).

endpoints.name: Buy by ID
endpoints.description: Buy item by unique item_id, sent to specified trade link.

endpoints.name: Buy by Name
endpoints.description: Buy item by name, sent to specified trade link.

endpoints.name: Search items by name
endpoints.description: Search for available items by name.

endpoints.name: List items for sale
endpoints.description: List Steam items from inventory for sale.

endpoints.name: Edit price
endpoints.description: Edit the price for listed items.

requirements: Steam access token (must be updated regularly)
Waxpeer API key from account settings
